market_pulse: EDC Week activity peaked this week with major residencies active at XS, LIV, and Zouk; competitive landscape shows strong talent lineups with John Summit, The Chainsmokers, and Gunna anchoring weekend schedules.

weekend_readiness.label: HIGH

weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Activate premium talent anchors for Saturday/Sunday; LIV Beach EDC content performing well — maintain momentum with exclusive sets and behind-the-scenes content.

content_gaps.description: Competitors (XS, Zouk) pushing live-streamed DJ sets and exclusive performance clips; LIV using static posts
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch live-stream teaser clips on TikTok/IG Stories during peak DJ sets at LIV/LIV Beach; 15-30 sec clips of talent exclusive moments

content_gaps.description: Competitors (OMNIA, TAO Beach) featuring local creator takeovers and influencer-hosted events; LIV underutilizing collaborations

content_gaps.description: TikTok trending audio absent from LIV/LIV Beach content; competitors using trending sounds in nightlife clips
content_gaps.suggested_action: Scout trending TikTok audio and remix into LIV club clips (dance floor energy, crowd reactions, DJ energy); post 2x daily
